extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath solution Explorer in Studio Web with a solution named "2-Way Matching Solution" containing an agent, an agentic process, and an RPA workflow. The add-project menu is open from the plus icon, displaying options to add different project types to the solution, with "Import existing" highlighted as the relevant action.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the + (Add project) icon in the Explorer header.
2. In the "Add project to solution" menu, click on "Import existing".
